COPY.title: Copy
COPY_TOKEN.title: Mirror Image
COPY_TOKEN.description: While you have mirror images, the first card you play each turn adds a 0-cost [gold]Ethereal[/gold] [gold]Exhaust[/gold] copy of itself to your hand for each mirror image. When you take unblocked damage, all mirror images die.
FIRST_MOVE.title: First Move
FIRST_MOVE.description: Triggers only if this is the first card you play this turn.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_REVERSAL.title: Reversal
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_REVERSAL.description:
If the enemy's intent includes attack, change it into gaining [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the damage it would have dealt.
If this card would have [gold]Ethereal[/gold], it gains [gold]Retain[/gold] instead.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_COUNTER.title: Counter
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_COUNTER.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add this enemy's attack intent damage to this card.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_BLIND.title: Blind
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_BLIND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_FORESIGHT.title: Foresight
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_FORESIGHT.description:
Choose up to 8 cards from your draw pile and place them on top in any order.
Gain 1 [img=32]res://illusionist/art/illusionist_energy_icon.webp[/img] next turn.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_FORESIGHT.selectionScre: Choose cards to place on top of your draw pile.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_MIRROR_IMAGE.title: Mirror Image
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_RIPOSTE.title: Riposte
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_RIPOSTE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, deal {Bonus:diff()} extra damage.
[gold]Transmute[/gold] this card into its upgraded version.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_PHANTOM_VENOM.title: Phantom Venom
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_PHANTOM_VENOM.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a Phantom Venom [gold]Transmuted[/gold] into a [gold]Toxic[/gold] to your discard pile.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_DISRUPT.title: Disrupt
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_DISRUPT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
If you have no mirror images, [gold]Copy[/gold] 1.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_OBSCURE.title: Obscure
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_OBSCURE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw 2 cards.
If the enemy intends to attack, gain {ExtraBlock:diff()} extra [gold]Block[/gold].
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_DETONATE.title: Detonate
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_DETONATE.description:
Destroy all [gold]mirror images[/gold].
For each one destroyed, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_SIPHON.title: Siphon
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_SIPHON.description:
Destroy all [gold]mirror images[/gold].
For each one destroyed, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] and 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_KINDLE.title: Kindle
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_KINDLE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Transmute[/gold] every Status card in your hand into a [gold]Dim Lamp[/gold].
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_DIM_LAMP.title: Dim Lamp
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_EXTINGUISHED_LAMP.title: Extinguished Lamp
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_SUMMON.title: Summon
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_SUMMON.description: Choose a non-Power card in your draw pile. Add a Toxic to your hand, [gold]Transmuted[/gold] into that card.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_SUMMON.selectionScreenP: Choose a non-Power card to summon a copy of.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_IMPROVISE.title: Improvise
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_IMPROVISE.description: The first time you transform a card each turn, play it at a random enemy.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_SILVER_LINING.title: Silver Lining
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_SILVER_LINING.descripti:
Gain 1 [img=32]res://illusionist/art/illusionist_energy_icon.webp[/img].
If the enemy has a negative effect, gain 1 [img=32]res://illusionist/art/illusionist_energy_icon.webp[/img].
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_MEMORY.title: Memory
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_MEMORY.description: Whenever a [gold]mirror image[/gold] is destroyed, draw 2 cards and gain 1 [img=32]res://illusionist/art/illusionist_energy_icon.webp[/img].
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_AMBUSH.title: Ambush
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_ECHO.title: Echo
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_ECHO.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a copy of this card into your discard pile, played 1 extra time.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_CONSCRIPT.title: Conscript
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_HEAVY_SLASH.title: Heavy Slash
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_FATE_LOOM.title: Fate Loom
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_FATE_LOOM.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a card from your discard pile on top of your draw pile.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_FATE_LOOM.selectionScre: Choose a card to put on top of your draw pile.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_RESHAPE.title: Reshape
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_RESHAPE.description: A card in your hand gains [gold]Replay[/gold].
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_RESHAPE.selectionScreen: Choose a card to gain Replay.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_FLICKER.title: Flicker
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_FLICKER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {Block:diff()} Block for each enemy with an Attack intent.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_KALEIDOSCOPE.title: Kaleidoscope
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_KALEIDOSCOPE.descriptio: Every 5 cards you play, [gold]Copy[/gold] 1 and deal 6 damage to ALL enemies.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_DAZE.title: Daze
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_DAZE.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
[gold]First Move[/gold]: draw 1 extra card.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_LAST_STAND.title: Last Stand
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_LAST_STAND.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you have no [gold]mirror images[/gold], gain {ExtraBlock:diff()} extra [gold]Block[/gold] and [gold]Copy[/gold] 2.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_PHASE_SHIFT.title: Phase Shift
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_PHASE_SHIFT.description: The next time you would take unblocked damage, your [gold]mirror images[/gold] are not destroyed.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_DISILLUSION.title: Disillusion
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_DISILLUSION.description: Choose {Cards:diff()} cards in your hand and [gold]Transmute[/gold] them into [gold]Dim Lamps[/gold].
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_DISILLUSION.selectionSc: Choose cards to transmute into Dim Lamps.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_DAZZLE.title: Dazzle
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_DAZZLE.description: At the start of your turn, gain 4 [gold]Block[/gold] for each [gold]mirror image[/gold] you have.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_UNVEIL.title: Unveil
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_SIEGE.title: Siege
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_SIEGE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies for each [gold]mirror image[/gold] you have.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_CRESCENDO.title: Crescendo
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_CRESCENDO.description:
Lose 4 [gold]Strength[/gold].
At the start of each turn, gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_PHANTASM_STORM.title: Phantasm Storm
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_PHANTASM_STORM.descript:
For each [gold]mirror image[/gold] you have, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Copy[/gold] 3. If you have no mirror images, [gold]Copy[/gold] 2 more.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_SABOTAGE.title: Illusionist's Wrath
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_SABOTAGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Deal extra damage to each enemy equal to its attack intent.
[gold]Transmute[/gold] a card in your hand into a copy of this card.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_FEINT.title: Feint
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_FEINT.description: If the target intends to attack, [gold]Stun[/gold] it.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_AGING.title: Catalyze
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_AGING.description:
Double your damage this turn.
If the target's intent is only [gold]Attack[/gold] and/or [gold]Block[/gold], advance it to next turn's intent, discarding the current one.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_PROVOKE.title: Provoke
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_PROVOKE.description:
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
If the enemy's intent includes attack, give it {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_REKINDLE.title: Rekindle
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_REKINDLE.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:|Gain 1 [gold]Frail[/gold].
}At the start of your next turn, [gold]Copy[/gold] 1.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_ENCORE.title: Encore
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_ENCORE.description: At the end of your turn, return a random card with [gold]Retain[/gold] from your discard pile to your hand.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_TRANSMUTE.title: Transmute
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_TRANSMUTE.description: Choose 1 of {Cards:diff()} random cards from your exhaust pile, then [gold]Transmute[/gold] a card in your hand into it.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_TRANSMUTE.selectionScre: Choose a card from your exhaust pile.
TRANSMUTE_TIP.title: Transmute
TRANSMUTE_TIP.description: [gold]Transform[/gold] a card. At the start of your next turn, [gold]transform[/gold] it into what it was before that [gold]transform[/gold].
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_FLUXWEAVE.title: Fluxweave
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_FLUXWEAVE.description: For every 2 cards you transform, draw 1 card.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_SHIFTING_BLADE.title: Shifting Blade
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_SHIFTING_BLADE.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Transmute[/gold] a card in your hand into a copy of this card.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_MIRROR_WARD.title: Mirror Ward
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_MIRROR_WARD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Transmute[/gold] a card in your hand into a copy of this card.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_MYRIAD_FACES.title: Myriad Faces
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_MYRIAD_FACES.descriptio: Choose a card in your hand. [gold]Transmute[/gold] every other card in your hand into a copy of it. Add that many Extinguished Lamps to your draw pile.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_METAMORPHOSIS.title: Metamorphosis
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_METAMORPHOSIS.descripti: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deal {Bonus:diff()} additional damage for each card you transformed this turn.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_CHANNEL.title: Channel
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_RECKONING.title: Reckoning
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_RECKONING.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deal {Bonus:diff()} additional damage for each card mentioning an enemy's intent you have played this combat.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_MOMENTUM.title: Momentum
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_MOMENTUM.description: For every 10 cards transformed or [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this combat, draw 1 card and gain 1 [img=32]res://illusionist/art/illusionist_energy_icon.webp[/img].
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_FOREWARN.title: Forewarn
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_FOREWARN.description:
Put a [gold]Prescience[/gold] into your hand whose [gold]Block[/gold] equals the target's current attack-intent damage.{IfUpgraded:show:
Prescience gains 10 extra Block.}
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_PRESCIENCE.title: Prescience
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_ACCRUE.title: Accrue
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_ACCRUE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
At the start of your turn, if this is in your hand, DOUBLE its damage.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_SACRIFICE.title: Sacrifice
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_SACRIFICE.description:
Gain 1 [img=32]res://illusionist/art/illusionist_energy_icon.webp[/img].
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
If you have a [gold]mirror image[/gold], destroy one.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_EXTRACT.title: Extract
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_EXTRACT.description:
Destroy all [gold]mirror images[/gold].
Gain 1 [img=32]res://illusionist/art/illusionist_energy_icon.webp[/img] at the start of each turn.
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_SHIFTING_WAVE.title: Shifting Wave
ILLUSIONIST_CARD_SHIFTING_WAVE.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Transmute[/gold] every Shifting Wave in all piles this combat into its upgraded form.
